programme.title: Seobok: Project Clone
programme.desc: As Ki-heon meets a cloned human, Seo Bok, his restless journey begins.

programme.title: Kung Fu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Filmmakers showcase the kung fu stuntmen and action directors in Hong Kong during the 1960s-'80s.

programme.title: Special ID
programme.desc: Police go undercover in a ruthless organization and become exposed one by one.

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating his family's massacre.

programme.title: Rise of the Legend
programme.desc: A martial arts master returns to the town where his father was murdered to take on a crime boss.

programme.title: Deliver Us From Evil
programme.desc: Contract killer In-nam travels to Thailand after completing his final contract.

programme.title: Kung Fu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Filmmakers showcase the kung fu stuntmen and action directors in Hong Kong during the 1960s-'80s.

programme.desc: Police go undercover in a ruthless organization and become exposed one by one.

programme.desc: A martial arts master returns to the town where his father was murdered to take on a crime boss.

programme.title: Deliver Us From Evil
programme.desc: Contract killer In-nam travels to Thailand after completing his final contract.

programme.title: Initial D
programme.desc: A teenage delivery boy (Jay Chou) utilizes special driving skills to compete against other racers.

programme.title: Initial D
programme.desc: A teenage delivery boy (Jay Chou) utilizes special driving skills to compete against other racers.

programme.title: Samurai Marathon
programme.desc: A young ninja goes undercover to win a race to prevent a shogunate from wrecking an alliance.

programme.title: Shocking Kung Fu of Huo's
programme.desc: Huo Zhenshan opens a school to promote Chinese martial arts 20 years after the Revolution of 1911.

programme.title: Railroad Tigers
programme.desc: Freedom fighters must battle an entire army after they ambush a heavily armed military train.

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: Chen Zhen and Xue Zili, the master of Form-Intention Fist, fight to defend the dignity of China.

programme.desc: A teenage delivery boy (Jay Chou) utilizes special driving skills to compete against other racers.

programme.desc: A young ninja goes undercover to win a race to prevent a shogunate from wrecking an alliance.

programme.title: Fist of Legend

programme.title: Operation Mekong
programme.desc: Members of a joint task force seek justice against an Asian drug lord and his murderous henchmen.

programme.title: Operation Red Sea
programme.desc: A commando force from the Chinese navy intercepts terrorists and rescues Chinese citizens in Yemen.

programme.title: War of the Arrows
programme.desc: A Korean archer must save his kidnapped sister from Manchurian soldiers.

programme.title: War of the Arrows
programme.desc: A Korean archer must save his kidnapped sister from Manchurian soldiers.

programme.title: Paradox
programme.desc: Using help from a local officer, a Hong Kong cop scours Thailand for his missing daughter.
